hero.subtitle: I build web products end to end: platforms, APIs and integrations, internal tools and fast sites, with AI in the loop.

services.title: Services
services.intro: I build web products end to end and automate the repetitive work with AI. Pick where to start or book a free diagnosis.
services.diagnosisBody: Let's talk for 30 minutes, free and with no commitment. I'll tell you what can be automated, what to build and where to start. Whether or not we work together, you leave with clarity.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.intro: Tell me what you need and I'll get back to you soon. You can also book a free diagnosis or message me on WhatsApp.

form.name: Name
form.successBody: Thank you. I'll reply within 24 hours. If you prefer, book your diagnosis directly.

errors.name: Enter your name (at least 2 characters)
errors.message: Tell me a bit more (at least 10 characters)
